name: Yuhuan

skills.name: Poignant Melodies
skills.description:
Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
War: Skills deal damage to nearby enemies.
Peace: Skills heal nearby allies.

skills.name: Tragic Beauty
skills.description: Damages and slows nearby targets. Her next Basic Attack will deal more damage.

skills.name: Mournful Tempo
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed, and after a brief delay, inflicts damage and stun on enemies in the target area.

skills.name: Melody of Peace
skills.description: Changes the melody to Peace, in which skills restore Health to nearby allies.

skillsZh.name: 驚鴻調
skillsZh.description:
楊玉環切換曲調，施放技能時產生不同效果。
破陣：施放技能對周圍敵人造成傷害。
清平：施放技能周圍友軍獲得治療。

skillsZh.name: 霓裳曲
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環對周圍目標造成傷害和減速。下次普攻造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 胡旋樂
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環獲得加速，在短暫延遲後對範圍目標造成傷害和暈眩。

skillsZh.name: 驚鴻・清平
skillsZh.description: 楊玉環切換曲調為清平，施放技能時回復周圍友軍英雄生命值。

tips: Build: Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 楊玉環（中路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.58%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：博學者之怒、虛無法杖、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Increased number of Skill 1 sound waves, base damage, and jungling effectiveness
patchHistory.detail: Her smile could melt your heart. The powdered faces of all the ladies-in-waiting paled in comparison

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能的音波數量和基礎傷害及打野效率
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「回眸一笑百媚生，六宮粉黛無顏色。」

faqs.question: Is Yuhuan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yuhuan is Tier B Mage with 50.58% win rate, 0.49% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Yuhuan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Ardent Dominion, Splendor.

faqs.question: How to counter Yuhuan?
faqs.answer: Pick Luna, Ying. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong.

faqsZh.question: 楊玉環 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 楊玉環 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.58%、選取 0.49%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 楊玉環 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：博學者之怒、虛無法杖、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、熾熱支配、輝月.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 楊玉環？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Luna、Ying。楊玉環 克制 Mai Shiranui、Nakoruru、Wukong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong. Weak into: Luna, Ying.

guide.overview: Yuhuan is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.6% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yuhuan: Changes the melody to produce different skill effects.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of Tranquility, Staves of Sorcery, then complete Savant's Wrath. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Yuhuan's Mage kit. Take Heal & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Tragic Beauty → Mournful Tempo → Melody of Peace → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Melody of Peace (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Tragic Beauty, and Melody of Peace on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Tragic Beauty → Mournful Tempo → Melody of Peace → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Yuhuan sits at Tier B globally (50.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yuhuan vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Yuhuan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Yuhuan vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 1.2% more often globally. Choose Yuhuan when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Yuhuan excels into Mai Shiranui, Nakoruru, Wukong. Avoid blind picking into Luna, Ying without team peel.
